news.headline: Momcozy, used by 3 million moms globally, featured on "Health Uncensored with Dr. Drew" on Fox Business Network.
news.summary: On October 20th, 2024, Momcozy, a brand favored by more than 3 million mothers globally, was featured on the program Health Uncensored with Dr. Drew, broadcasted on Fox Business Network. This significant appearance showcased Momcozy's products and services to a wide audience. Dr. Drew Pinsky, the host of the show, discussed the brand's offerings during the episode.

news.headline: Verizon revamps broadband plan for millions, offering more options and savings.
IMF Chief Economist Gourinchas: Inflation progress is more pronounced for advanced economies, to reach the target in 2025.
Know Labs in Seattle has announced an expanded technology team and accelerated platform development to secure partnerships.
news.summary: Know Labs, based in Seattle, has revealed enhancements in its executive team to bolster its technology leadership. The company is ramping up its platform development efforts to establish key partnerships. This move is pivotal in the company's strategy to drive growth and innovation. The team expansion signals a significant step towards achieving their goals, with plans to leverage their expertise to navigate the competitive landscape. The company's focus on securing strategic partnerships highlights their commitment to staying ahead in the market.

news.headline: Benchmark Gensuite launches Responsio, an AI product to manage ESG, sustainability, and EHS data requests, aiding organizations.
news.summary: CINCINNATI--Benchmark Gensuite, a top Environmental Health & Safety (EHS) and sustainability platform provider, has introduced Responsio, its inaugural comprehensive AI solution. This innovative product aims to revolutionize the way companies handle the rising number and intricacies of requests for ESG, sustainability, and EHS data. With regulatory demands and the importance of supply chain visibility on the rise, organizations are facing a growing challenge. Through Responsio, Benchmark Gensuite offers a streamlined approach to manage these demands effectively.

news.headline: Yardi and SafelyYou partner to enhance senior care with new interface, providing unprecedented data.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a partnership has been formed between Yardi, a prominent provider of senior living management software, and SafelyYou, a leading company in improving care in senior living. This collaboration aims to integrate advanced AI, innovative hardware, and expert clinicians to enhance care for seniors. The partnership will introduce a new interface that provides unprecedented data insights for senior living organizations. By utilizing this interface, entities using Yardi and SafelyYou will gain access to valuable care measurement information.

news.headline: Cohesity introduces visual data exploration tool for Cohesity Gaia, enhancing AI capabilities. Helps users gain insights faster with themes across documents and files. #cohesity
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Cohesity, a prominent company in AI-driven data security, has announced the addition of a patent-pending visual data exploration feature to Cohesity Gaia. This innovation, which builds upon the previously launched AI-powered search assistant, offers customers a unique visual representation of themes present in documents and files within a dataset. By doing so, the visual data explorer enhances data context and proposes queries to assist users in obtaining insights more efficiently. This new capability aims to streamline data analysis processes, ultimately enabling users to make informed decisions quickly.

news.headline: NAIFA partners with Practice Intel to enhance advice quality and drive growth for advisory firms.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, NAIFA has teamed up with Practice Intel to enhance the quality of advice provided by advisory firms and stimulate natural growth. This partnership aims to assist firms in delivering improved services to clients and boosting their development.

news.headline: Tune in to hear from RBC's McKay discussing trade, inflation, housing, and energy on Bloomberg.
J.M. Smucker Co. to sell Voortman® cookie brand to Second Nature Brands with CapVest Partners, part of portfolio optimization.
news.summary: Today, the J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) from Orrville, Ohio, disclosed that they have finalized a deal to sell their Voortman® cookie brand. The brand was sold to Second Nature Brands, a company specializing in high-quality snacks and treats, owned by CapVest Partners LLP. The specific financial details of the agreement were not disclosed.

news.headline: VoltServer introduces Tetra platform, delivering over 250% more power per. Leader in fault managed power solutions.Characters: 104
news.summary: In East Greenwich, Rhode Island on October 22, 2024, VoltServer, a prominent provider of fault managed power solutions, has unveiled its groundbreaking third-generation platform, Tetra. This new platform is reshaping power distribution by offering a remarkable increase of over 250% in power delivery compared to previous solutions.

news.headline: Norfolk Southern Corp (NYSE:NSC) beat Q3 earnings estimates with $3.25 EPS. Operating revenues at $3.1B, up 3% YoY.
news.summary: Norfolk Southern Corp released their third-quarter financial results, exceeding analyst expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings of $3.25 per share, surpassing the estimated $3.11 per share. Railway operating revenues increased by 3% year-over-year to $3.1 billion. Income from railway operations saw an 11% uptick from the previous year. The operating ratio stood at 47.7%. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: We probably won't see inflation much above 2%.
ECB's Centeno: I still expect inflation to tick up.
Solana Protocol Elmnts introduces tokenized mineral rights platform. Mineral & royalty interests estimated at $700 billion.
news.summary: According to energy market analytics firm RBN Energy, mineral and royalty interests are valued at approximately $700 billion.

news.headline: Chosen Foods introduces Avocado Oil Shortening, a clean kitchen essential made from 100% pure avocado oil, great for baking and frying.
news.summary: In San Diego, Chosen Foods, the top Avocado Oil brand in America, has unveiled a new product - Avocado Oil Shortening. This kitchen essential is made from 100% Pure Avocado Oil and contains only one ingredient: fractionated avocado oil. The product is aimed at catering to baking and frying needs, offering a clean and simple alternative for recipes that traditionally use shortening or butter. Chosen Foods' Avocado Oil Shortening is set to become a go-to choice for consumers looking for a healthier cooking option.

news.headline: Megan Thee Stallion and Hunxho to star in True Religion's 2024 holiday campaign in Los Angeles.
news.summary: A recent press release from True Religion revealed that Megan Thee Stallion has been chosen as the prominent figure for the brand's upcoming holiday campaign in Los Angeles. The campaign will also showcase Hunxho alongside Megan Thee Stallion.

news.headline: GenNx360 Capital Partners announces Nutra-Med acquiring Legacy Pharma Solutions on Oct 22, 2024. Nutra-Med is a key contract packaging services provider.
news.summary: In an exciting development on October 22, 2024, GenNx360 Capital Partners shared the news of Nutra-Med's successful acquisition of Legacy Pharma Solutions. Nutra-Med, supported by GenNx360, stands out as a prominent player in contract packaging services. This move signifies a significant progression in Nutra-Med's growth strategy and industry consolidation.

news.headline: BuzzRx introduces vaccination scheduling tool at CVS Pharmacy, helping users find and book appointments. Released on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A newly launched tool is assisting customers in locating and booking COVID-19 vaccine appointments at CVS Pharmacy. The tool, provided by BuzzRx, a prescription savings service, enables users to quickly locate the most affordable pricing for their medications at various pharmacies. This announcement was made in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on October 22, 2024. This tool can be accessed for free and aims to streamline the process of scheduling vaccine appointments.

news.headline: Uncle Funky's Daughter partners with Texas Southern University for MPoWR Her Grant to empower female entrepreneurs with a $50,000 endowment from The Rhoten Morris Family.
news.summary: A popular natural hair care brand, Uncle Funky's Daughter, has joined forces with Texas Southern University (TSU) in Houston on an empowering project. The collaboration aims to support female entrepreneurs through the MPoWR Her Grant program. The initiative has received a generous $50,000 contribution from The Rhoten Morris Family. This partnership is designed to uplift women in business and provide them with opportunities for success.

news.headline: CardFlight gets growth investment from WestView Capital Partners to expand payment solutions for small businesses nationwide.
news.summary: CardFlight, a prominent SaaS payment technology company, has disclosed a substantial minority investment to power the expansion of its payment solutions for small businesses across the country. The investment was announced on October 22, 2024, in New York City. This investment is aimed at enhancing the company's services and offerings for small businesses and further establishing its presence nationwide.

news.headline: Infolinks Media appoints Jonathan Slavin as Chief Business Officer - a premium advertising marketplace.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 22, 2024, in Ridgewood, New Jersey, Infolinks Media revealed their appointment of Jonathan Slavin as the Chief Business Officer. The company is a renowned advertising marketplace ensuring top-quality curation of ad placements. This strategic move aims to leverage Slavin's extensive experience in advertising to drive growth and innovation within the company.

news.headline: Bolt Projects Holdings sees increase in brands choosing b-silk™ for product differentiation in skincare, haircare, and cosmetics.
news.summary: Bolt Projects Holdings, based in Berkeley, California, is introducing customer product launches showcasing its exclusive b-silk™ technology in the skincare, haircare, and color cosmetics categories. This innovative development is set to revolutionize the industry, with the potential to make a significant impact on consumer markets.

news.headline: The Preiss Company buys and renames Elevate 231 to The Collective at Columbia, a student housing community in Missouri with 318 units and 972 beds.
news.summary: The Preiss Company (TPCO), a leading privately held student housing owner-operator, has revealed the purchase and renaming of Elevate 231 to The Collective at Columbia in Columbia, Missouri. This student housing community caters to University of Missouri students and comprises 318 units with 972 beds. The variety of floor plans includes two to four-bedroom options.

news.headline: Proteus, an alternative asset platform in Indianapolis, partners with Concurrent Investment Advisors, a multi-custodial advisor.
news.summary: Proteus, a prominent alternative asset platform located in Indianapolis, has recently disclosed an exciting new collaboration with Concurrent Investment Advisors, a hybrid registered investment advisor operating across multiple custodial platforms. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Proteus and comes as a part of their strategic growth plan. The alliance is expected to leverage the strengths of both entities to enhance their respective offerings in the financial services sector. Overall, this development signifies a positive advancement for Proteus and Concurrent Investment Advisors as they aim to capitalize on this strategic opportunity.

news.headline: Elmhurst 1925 brings back limited-edition products: Apple Pie Spice Blend, Pumpkin Spice Oat Creamer, and OatNog™. Get them now!
news.summary: In Elma, New York, Elmhurst® 1925, known for its top-quality plant-based dairy items, has brought back its seasonal range featuring popular products: Apple Pie Spice Blend, Pumpkin Spice Oat Creamer, and OatNog™. These exclusive flavors can now be bought as customers prepare for the upcoming holiday period. The Apple Pie Spice Blend from Elmhurst 1925 offers a smooth oat-cashew foundation with hints of baked apple and a flaky pie crust. This blend is favored by baristas for creating unique beverages.

news.headline: DP World opens new freight forwarding office in Panama City to expand Latin America network, offering comprehensive services.
news.summary: DP World, a prominent player in logistics and supply chain services, has unveiled its latest addition in Panama City, Panama – a state-of-the-art freight forwarding office. This move expands DP World’s presence in Latin America and enhances its ability to deliver comprehensive supply chain solutions to businesses in the region. The office is equipped to offer a wide array of freight forwarding services, including ocean freight for both Full Container Loads (FCL). This strategic development underscores DP World’s commitment to strengthening its network in Latin America and catering to the escalating demand for efficient supply chain solutions.

news.headline: PCA SKIN's serum boosts skin's hyaluronic acid by 50% in 24 hours, providing unmatched hydration. Efficacy proven.
news.summary: A highly acclaimed hyaluronic acid serum has been recognized for its exceptional hydrating properties, standing out among competitors in the market. Recently released in SCOTTSDALE, Arizona on Oct. 22, 2024, PCA SKIN's renowned Hyaluronic Acid Boosting Serum has gained popularity for its effectiveness in increasing the skin's hyaluronic acid levels by an impressive 50%. This best-selling serum has set a new standard in skincare with its unparalleled hydration benefits.

news.headline: Accountants and finance professionals are increasingly pessimistic about the global economy, with confidence improving in North America. Uncertainty is high due to geopolitical developments and the upcoming U.S. election.
news.summary: In the previous quarter, confidence in North America saw an uptick, reaching higher levels. However, there is a significant increase in uncertainty due to ongoing geopolitical events and the upcoming U.S. election. This information was disclosed in the newest report from the ACCA (the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants) released on October 22, 2024. The surge in confidence was noticeable, yet it is crucial to acknowledge the heightened levels of uncertainty currently present.

news.headline: Figure Technology Solutions expands to NY and DE with HELOC, now serving 49 states, enhancing market reach and partnerships.
news.summary: In an announcement today, Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. revealed the extension of its services to New York and Delaware, marking the inclusion of the entire East Coast region in its offerings. This launch of the embedded home equity line of credit (HELOC) solidifies Figure's reach to 49 states and Washington, DC. The expansion not only enhances Figure's networks with licensed lending partners but also fortifies its position as a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: NotCo introduces AI-powered fragrance formulator in New York, promising unprecedented personalization and creativity.
news.summary: A new artificial intelligence-powered fragrance formulator has been introduced by NotCo in New York. This innovation allows for unparalleled levels of personalization, customization, and creativity in creating fragrances. This technology is set to revolutionize the fragrance industry by providing unique scents tailored to individual preferences.

news.headline: Kelchner's introduces 2 new sauce flavors: Yum Yum Dipping Sauce & Seafood Boil Marinade & Sauce. World's largest horseradish manufacturer.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Allentown, Pennsylvania, Kelchner Food Products, a brand under Huntsinger Farms, Inc., the leading horseradish grower and processor globally, introduced two new sauces. These included the Yum Yum Dipping Sauce and the Seafood Boil Marinade and Sauce. The company is renowned for enhancing flavors with these latest offerings.

news.headline: Tour24 secures $5M in Series-B funding to improve apartment leasing operations for multifamily real estate with self-guided tours.
news.summary: Boston-based company Tour24, known for their self-guided tours, recently completed a Series B financing round raising $5 million. The funding was primarily provided by RET Ventures, a renowned real estate technology venture capital firm. Established in 2020, Tour24 aims to enhance the apartment leasing process for multifamily property owners and operators through a user-friendly, self-guided tour platform. This initiative caters to the increasing need for renter convenience and allows potential tenants to easily schedule and conduct tours at their own convenience.

news.headline: Hugging Face and Protect AI collaborate to enhance security for the world's largest open source ML models repository.
news.summary: A new high standard for AI security has been established through the partnership between Protect AI and Hugging Face. This collaboration aims to safeguard the world's largest collection of open-source machine learning models. The partnership, based in Seattle and Brooklyn, sees the coming together of two leading entities in the AI industry to ensure the security of over [insert number] ML models.

news.headline: Viant to host Direct Access event at NASDAQ MarketSite to discuss CTV's impact on customer journey performance.
news.summary: Viant Technology Inc. based in Irvine, California, introduced its second annual Direct Access event. The event, themed "CTV: Accelerating Performance Throughout the Customer Journey," aims to focus on connected TV (CTV) technology.

news.headline: Haven partners with Kastle for AI voice agents, enhancing mortgage servicing with integrated call center ops.
news.summary: In an announcement made in New York, fintech platform Haven revealed a new partnership with Kastle, an AI voice agent provider for mortgage servicing. This strategic collaboration aims to enhance the mortgage servicing experience by incorporating AI-driven call center operations. Through this integration, homeowners can access all their mortgage-related services under the umbrella of their lender's brand, ensuring a streamlined and efficient process. This move will offer homeowners a singular point of contact for their mortgage needs, promising a more convenient and personalized experience.

news.headline: Thryv integrates AI into Social Media Management Tool for small businesses. 50% believe AI can impact social media.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Thryv® revealed that nearly 50% of small businesses view social media as a key marketing area where AI technology can make a significant difference. Thryv, a prominent small business software platform listed on NASDAQ as THRY, has taken steps to actualize this perspective by integrating AI-powered features into Thryv Marketing Center™. Through the newly introduced Social Media Management Tool, businesses can now seamlessly manage their social media presence across various platforms such as Instagram and TikTok.

news.headline: Trex plans to expand leadership in outdoor living with new 2025 products. Brand synonymous with high-performance decking. Trex Company (NYSE:TREX) poised to elevate beyond decking to total outdoor living resource, with focus on railing for 2025.
news.summary: Trex Company, a leading composite decking brand traded on NYSE as TREX, is set to broaden its offerings in 2025 after over 30 years of specializing in low-maintenance decking. The company's plan includes expanding its product range to position itself as a comprehensive outdoor living provider. Trex aims to focus on railing products in 2025, according to Adam Zambanini, the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. This shift signals a strategic move towards establishing Trex as a dominant player in the outdoor living market.

news.headline: Busuu unveils AI Conversations feature, helping 120M+ users practice dialogues for speech proficiency.
news.summary: In London, Busuu, a Chegg service and language learning platform boasting more than 120 million registered users, has introduced a new feature called Busuu Conversations. This feature aims to assist language learners in improving their speaking skills by engaging in realistic dialogues. Through simulated exchanges powered by artificial intelligence, users can practice conversations resembling daily situations and receive instant feedback on their performance. This initiative is designed to enhance users' confidence and help them progress towards achieving proficiency in speech.

news.headline: IMF states inflation battle globally mostly successful, numbers show decline.
Capital Corp Merchant Banking proposes major funding for a township project in the Philippines, focusing on sustainable infrastructure.
news.summary: Orlando, Florida - Capital Corp Merchant Banking, an esteemed financial institution globally acknowledged for its inventive financing options, has revealed a substantial funding offer for a major mixed-use township development project in the Philippines. This proposal illustrates the company's dedication to aiding sustainable and revolutionary infrastructure and real estate advancements on a global scale. The proposed township aims to incorporate a mix of residential and commercial structures, with an emphasis on fostering economic growth and community development.

news.headline: Polly advances AI in mortgage markets with Polly/™ AI, offering near-miss eligibility & pricing. Empowers lenders.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Polly, the top provider of advanced mortgage capital markets technology, revealed the ongoing growth of its pioneering AI platform, Polly/™ AI. The introduction of advanced features such as near-miss eligibility, near-miss pricing, and suggestion actions aims to enhance support for top lenders, loan officers, and mortgage brokers. The platform stands out as the industry's first cloud-native, commercially scalable product and pricing engine.

news.headline: Holistic AI launches Holistic AI OSL, an open-source library to build fair AI. Tools help eliminate bias.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Holistic AI, a prominent AI governance platform, has introduced Holistic AI OSL. This new open-source library is tailored to support developers in constructing equitable and responsible AI systems. The platform offers specialized resources for eradicating bias and enhancing transparency, enabling AI architects and developers to enhance the fairness and accountability of their AI creations. Holistic AI OSL equips teams with cutting-edge tools to develop clear and reliable AI applications, emphasizing transparency and ethical practices.

news.headline: PacBio's Onso™ short read sequencing platform joins 10x Genomics Compatible Partner Program, expanding research options.
news.summary: Announced on October 22, 2024, in Menlo Park, California, PacBio (Nasdaq: PACB) revealed the integration of the Onso short-read sequencing platform into the 10x Genomics Compatible Partner Program. This move signifies PacBio's position as a leading developer of high-quality genomic sequencing solutions. The program acknowledges instruments and workflows that align with 10x Genomics’ products and applications, expanding sequencing options for researchers globally. This collaboration aims to enhance access to advanced sequencing technologies and facilitate breakthroughs in genomic research.

news.headline: Tuttle Capital Management launches EUAD ETF for European aerospace & defense industry - symbol EUAD.
news.summary: The STOXX Europe Aerospace & Defense ETF, identified by the ticker symbol EUAD, has been chosen for investment. This ETF focuses on companies within the aerospace and defense sectors in Europe. This selection indicates a strategic move to capitalize on the performance of these industries in the region. EUAD provides investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of European aerospace and defense companies, allowing them to potentially benefit from the growth and stability of this sector. Its inclusion in the investment portfolio showcases confidence in the current and future performance of the aerospace and defense industries within Europe.

news.headline: West Coast Community Bancorp reported $8.2 million net income in Q3 2024, down from $9.1 million in Q3 2023. Year-to-date earnings were $25.7 million, a decrease from $26.3 million in 2023. Board declared a $0.18 cash dividend per common share. The bank's assets increased to $1.80 billion, with deposits at $1.53 billion and gross loans at $1.39 billion. Merger with 1st Capital Bank was finalized on Oct 1, 2024. Financial highlights include net interest margin at 4.92%, efficiency ratio at 43.65%, and return on average assets at 1.94%.
news.summary: West Coast Community Bancorp, the parent company of Santa Cruz County Bank, reported third quarter unaudited earnings of $8.2 million, with year-to-date earnings reaching $25.7 million for the nine-month period. The Board announced an increased quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share, payable on November 12, 2024. The company successfully merged with 1st Capital Bank on October 1, 2024, resulting in assets nearing $2.8 billion. Total assets as of September 30, 2024, were $1.80 billion, with deposits totaling $1.53 billion and gross loans at $1.39 billion. The net interest margin for the third quarter was 4.92%, and key financial ratios remained strong, with return on average assets at 1.87%, return on average equity at 12.95%, and efficiency ratio at 45.76%. The merger expenses impacted various financial metrics but the company remains well-capitalized, with a total risk-based capital ratio of 16.62%. Tangible book value per share also increased to $27.20 at September 30, 2024.

news.headline: NVR, Inc. reports $429.3 million net income in Q3, 2024, with $2.73 billion revenues, homebuilding segment revenues at $2.68 billion, and mortgage banking segment income at $34.9 million.
news.summary: NVR, Inc., a prominent homebuilding and mortgage banking company, reported its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. The net income for this quarter was $429.3 million, with earnings per diluted share at $130.50 – a 1% decrease in net income from the previous year, but a 4% increase in earnings per share. Consolidated revenues for Q3 2024 were $2.73 billion, up 6% from the same quarter in 2023. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, consolidated revenues reached $7.68 billion, an 8% increase year-over-year. Net income for this nine-month period was $1.22 billion, a 4% rise compared to 2023. Homebuilding saw an increase in new orders by 19% and settled units by 5% while mortgage closed loan production rose by 2%. The effective tax rate for nine months ended September 30, 2024, was at 20.6%, slightly higher than the previous year. NVR operates in homebuilding and mortgage banking segments and has reported growth in various financial metrics despite challenges such as higher lot costs and decreases in mortgage banking segment income.

news.headline: Littelfuse introduces RCMP20 Residual Current Monitor Series for Mode 2 & Mode 3 EV charging stations, supporting higher currents.
news.summary: Chicago-based industrial technology manufacturing company Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS) unveiled the RCMP20 Residual Current Monitor Series designed for Mode 2 and Mode 3 EV charging stations. This series, catering to electric vehicles (EVs), raises the bar for safety standards in charging with enhanced performance and flexibility in a compact build. It allows for higher charging currents compared to existing solutions in the market. The announcement marks a significant advancement towards a sustainable and connected world.

news.headline: 76% of U.S. drivers likely to use voice generative AI in their vehicles; 86% of voice assistant users use it weekly.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc. revealed results of a survey on US vehicle owners. The survey showed that nearly 80% of drivers are inclined to utilize a voice assistant with voice generative AI functions. Out of those surveyed, 76% have access to an in-vehicle voice assistant and 86% of them use it weekly. SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN) is recognized as a global leader in voice artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Samsara's AI Drowsiness Detection launched globally; alerts drivers with in-cab audio and managers via text/email.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) introduced its Drowsiness Detection feature to customers worldwide. This feature, now generally available, utilizes Samsara's advanced AI models developed from a vast dataset to identify signs of drowsiness in real-time. It then sends audio alerts to drivers in-cab and notifies managers via text or email in case of fatigue-related incidents.
